topics.title: Greetings & Introductions
topics.description: Learn to say hello, introduce yourself, and ask simple questions like 'What is your name?'

topics.title: Colors & Shapes
topics.description: Vocabulary for basic colors and shapes with fun matching activities and games.

topics.title: Numbers 1-20
topics.description: Counting, recognizing, and writing numbers with songs and interactive exercises.

topics.title: My Family
topics.description: Family member vocabulary — mom, dad, brother, sister — with picture activities.

topics.title: Animals & Pets
topics.description: Learn animal names, sounds, and simple sentences like 'I have a cat.'

topics.title: Daily Routines
topics.description: Talk about morning, afternoon, and evening activities using simple present tense.

topics.title: Food & Drinks
topics.description: Ordering food, expressing likes and dislikes — 'I like pizza, I don't like broccoli.'

topics.title: Weather & Seasons
topics.description: Describe the weather and seasons with adjectives — sunny, rainy, hot, cold.

topics.title: Storytelling
topics.description: Read short stories, answer comprehension questions, and retell stories in your own words.

topics.title: Show & Tell
topics.description: Practice speaking confidently by presenting a favorite object or topic to the class.

topics.title: Self-Introduction & Small Talk
topics.description: Introduce yourself naturally, talk about hobbies, school, and interests.

topics.title: Present Simple & Continuous
topics.description: Master the difference between habits and actions happening now.

topics.title: Everyday Vocabulary
topics.description: Essential words for school, home, travel, and social situations.

topics.title: Expressing Opinions
topics.description: Learn to agree, disagree, and share your thoughts politely in discussions.

topics.title: Past Tenses & Storytelling
topics.description: Use past simple and past continuous to tell stories and describe experiences.

topics.title: Travel & Directions
topics.description: Navigate airports, ask for directions, and handle travel situations confidently.

topics.title: Debate & Discussion
topics.description: Build arguments, use persuasive language, and participate in structured debates.

topics.title: Academic Writing Basics
topics.description: Write structured paragraphs with topic sentences, supporting details, and conclusions.

topics.title: Exam Overview & Format
topics.description: Understand the IELTS/TOEFL test structure, timing, scoring, and what to expect.

topics.title: Listening Skills Foundation
topics.description: Practice identifying main ideas, key details, and speaker attitudes in recordings.

topics.title: Reading Comprehension Strategies
topics.description: Skimming, scanning, and answering different question types efficiently.

topics.title: Speaking Part 1 & 2
topics.description: Practice answering personal questions and delivering a 2-minute talk on a given topic.

topics.title: Writing Task 1 — Graphs & Charts
topics.description: Describe visual data clearly with appropriate vocabulary and structure.

topics.title: Writing Task 2 — Essay Practice
topics.description: Write opinion, discussion, and problem-solution essays with band 7+ structure.

topics.title: Full Practice Tests
topics.description: Complete timed mock tests with detailed feedback and scoring.

topics.title: Self-Introduction & Basics
topics.description: Introduce yourself confidently, talk about your job, family, and daily life.

topics.title: Essential Grammar Review
topics.description: Present tenses, articles, prepositions — build a solid grammar foundation.

topics.title: Shopping & Restaurants
topics.description: Order food, ask about prices, and handle common shopping conversations.

topics.title: Conversation & Fluency
topics.description: Practice natural conversation flow, fillers, and how to keep a discussion going.

topics.title: News & Current Events
topics.description: Read and discuss news articles to build vocabulary and critical thinking skills.

topics.title: Pronunciation & Accent
topics.description: Improve clarity with stress, intonation, and commonly mispronounced words.

topics.title: Idioms & Advanced Vocabulary
topics.description: Master common idioms, phrasal verbs, and advanced expressions for natural speech.

topics.title: Public Speaking & Presentations
topics.description: Structure presentations, use persuasive language, and speak with confidence.
